text:
After world rebuild with connected flash drive  FreeBSD not reboot.

last messages
umass0: at uhub1, port 2, addr 2 (disconnected)
(da0:umass-sim0:0:0:0): lost device - 0 outstanding, 1 refs

How-To-Repeat: Rebuild and install world (revision r250230)
Booting with new world, connect flash drive on usb.
shutdown -r now
